source_jobs.title: Spontaneous Application
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE MOBILE-FIRST COMPANY

Most tools for small businesses weren’t built for real operators.
They were built for employees in offices, not people running a business from their phone.

We’re changing that.

We build mobile-first business software that feels like a consumer app, runs on AI, and spreads like a creator brand.

Our first product, Allo https://www.withallo.com/, gives you a second number on your phone, answers missed calls with AI, transcribes everything, and syncs it to your CRM.

Over 20,000 businesses use it every day.
Next up: expenses, invoicing, and more.

We’ve raised +15 million dolars from Base10, Lightspeed, EMBLEM, and 30+ top operators.
Our team is based in Paris, Buenos Aires, Miami.






WHY THIS PAGE EXISTS



We don’t always know what we need before we meet you.
Maybe you’re a builder, operator, writer, seller, designer, or generalist.
If you think you can help us go faster, this is the place to say it.

Whether you’ve scaled a company or are hungry to prove yourself in your first one.
Whether you want to lead or contribute.

Tell us what you want to work on and what you’re great at.
We’ll read every single one.




HOW TO APPLY

Click the Apply button on this page to send your application.

No cover letter needed just tell us who you are and why this role fits you.

Not the perfect match, but want to join us? Send a spontaneous application to talent@themobilefirst.co jeremy@themobilefirst.co.

We welcome people from all backgrounds.

If you’re part of an underrepresented group in tech, we especially want to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer 🇦🇷
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE MOBILE-FIRST COMPANY

Most tools for small businesses weren’t built for real operators.
They were built for employees in offices, not people running a business from their phone.

We’re changing that.

We build mobile-first business software that feels like a consumer app, runs on AI, and spreads like a creator brand.

Our first product, Allo https://www.withallo.com/, gives you a second number on your phone, answers missed calls with AI, transcribes everything, and syncs it to your CRM.

Over 20,000 businesses use it every day.
Next up: expenses, invoicing, and more.

We’ve raised +15 million dolars from Base10, Lightspeed, EMBLEM, and 30+ top operators.
Our team is based in Paris, Buenos Aires, Miami.



Drive the evolution of our backend technology, infrastructure, and AI capabilities to ensure high performance, scalability, and seamless integration for our mobile applications.




WHAT WILL YOU DO:

 - Work side by side with our CTO to build the foundations, the present, and the future of our backend, and AI systems.

 - Develop and enhance backend systems for both existing and new applications in conjunction with mobile engineers.

 - Contribute to systems design, infrastructure planning, CI/CD processes, and data workflows.
   
   



WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON

 - Implementing and maintaining scalable and reliable backend systems using languages like Kotlin, Java, Go, Python or similar.

 - Designing and defining backend tools, databases, and the architecture of our apps.

 - Working directly with Cloud services (e.g., AWS, Supabase, Cloudflare).

 - Creating tools, libraries, or components to enhance the efficiency of backend development processes.







WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 1. Backend Engineering:
    
    - Proficiency in backend development with expertise in languages like Kotlin, Java, Go, Python or similar.
    
    - Familiarity with database design, management, and optimization.
    
    - Track record of building and maintaining scalable and reliable backend systems.
    
    - Experience with AI is a strong plus, especially in applying models to real-world product use cases and optimizing performance in production environments.

 2. Systems Architecture:
    
    - Expertise in designing scalable and maintainable backend architectures, understanding when to apply different architectural patterns.
    
    - Capable of monitoring the whole architecture using tools like New Relic or Datadog.

 3. Performance and data
    
    - You know how to build scalable and maintainable code
    
    - You care about what to measure and how it impacts business and users
    
    - You track behavior, usage, and performance, and improve based on it

 4. How you think
    
    - You care about why we build things, not just how.
    
    - You ask smart questions, challenge ideas when needed, and help shape what’s next.
    
    - You think in terms of user value and business impact.

 5. How you work
    
    - You communicate clearly, give feedback with no ego, and help others grow.
    
    - You move fast, take ownership, and thrive in ambiguity.
    
    - You're comfortable working in English — and in a small team with big goals.






WHAT MATTERS TO US

 - You’ve worked in product companies

 - 4+ years of experience designing and building high-performance systems used by millions.

 - You’re proactive, autonomous, and know how to fill the gaps

 - You can communicate in English, since that's our official language. Most of the team also speaks Spanish and French.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary (in USD or local equivalent)

 - Equity package

 - 10-day team retreats abroad every quarter

 - Trips to our Hubs (Pairs/Miami/BA) for onboarding and more

 - Laptop and work setup of your choice

 - Coverage for private health insurance (for US or LATAM hires)

 - A tight, ambitious team building something real: fast


HOW TO APPLY

Click the Apply button on this page to send your application.

No cover

source_jobs.title: Creator Ambassador Allo
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE MOBILE-FIRST COMPANY

Most tools for small businesses weren’t built for real operators.
They were built for employees in offices, not people running a business from their phone.

We’re changing that.

We build mobile-first business software that feels like a consumer app, runs on AI, and spreads like a creator brand.

Our first product, Allo https://www.withallo.com/, gives you a second number on your phone, answers missed calls with AI, transcribes everything, and syncs it to your CRM.

Over 20,000 businesses use it every day.
Next up: expenses, invoicing, and more.

We’ve raised +15 million dolars from Base10, Lightspeed, EMBLEM, and 30+ top operators.
Our team is based in Paris, Buenos Aires, Miami.



Allo – We’re Looking for Our Next Creator Ambassador

We're building Allo, an AI phone system designed for small sales teams. 20,000+ businesses already trust us to handle their calls, automate their CRM updates, and save hours of admin work every day. Join us to create the biggest community of small business owners who refuse to waste time on admin work.

That’s where you come in. We’re searching for independent creators who know how to craft content that connects. Whether it’s a sharp LinkedIn post, a video breakdown, or a blog that actually gets read — you have a voice, and people listen to it.




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We’re not looking for follower counts. We’re looking for creators with real engagement, authentic voices, and strong expertise in business, tech, or sales.

 - You’re an active Allo user. We want our ambassadors to speak from real experience, not just from a brief.

 - You have experience with CRM, sales, or related tools.

 - You create content across multiple formats (videos, blogs, newsletters, LinkedIn posts, Instagram reels).

 - You have an engaged community (quality > quantity).

 - You’re fluent in English or French (Spanish is a plus).

 - You are an independent creator (not an agency).




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Tell the Allo story in your own authentic style.

 - Create at least 2 pieces of content per month (posts, videos, tutorials, event recaps, collabs).

 - Participate in events, webinars, or campaigns when relevant.

 - Collaborate with our product and marketing team to align on key messaging, while keeping your authentic voice.

 - Work closely with our team to highlight how entrepreneurs worldwide use Allo.




HOW WE’LL WORK TOGETHER

 - Paid per piece of content.

 - Flexible publishing: share on your own channels, create for ours, or both.

 - A chance to be one of the first creator voices behind a startup backed by leading investors and growing 60% MoM.




WHY IT MATTERS

 - Be part of a fast-growing product used by 20K+ daily active users.

 - Collaborate with a global startup backed by leading investors.

 - Gain visibility as a thought leader in tech, sales, and SMB tools.

 - Shape how entrepreneurs worldwide discover and use Allo.
   
   

SMBs are the backbone of every economy, yet most tools weren’t designed for them. At Allo, we’re changing that. And your content can put this movement in front of the right people, with the right message.




HOW TO APPLY

Click the Apply button on this page to send your application.

No cover letter needed just tell us who you are and why this role fits you.

Not the perfect match, but want to join us? Send a spontaneous application to talent@themobilefirst.co jeremy@themobilefirst.co.

We welcome people from all backgrounds.

If you’re part of an underrepresented group in tech, we especially want to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Head of Growth
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE MOBILE-FIRST COMPANY

Most tools for small businesses weren’t built for real operators.
They were built for employees in offices, not people running a business from their phone.

We’re changing that.

We build mobile-first business software that feels like a consumer app, runs on AI, and spreads like a creator brand.

Our first product, Allo https://www.withallo.com/, gives you a second number on your phone, answers missed calls with AI, transcribes everything, and syncs it to your CRM.

Over 20,000 businesses use it every day.
Next up: expenses, invoicing, and more.

We’ve raised +15 million dolars from Base10, Lightspeed, EMBLEM, and 30+ top operators.
Our team is based in Paris, Buenos Aires, Miami.



We are hiring a Head of Growth to design, own, and scale the growth motion, with a strong focus on the US market. This role is critical to building a repeatable engine across acquisition, activation, and monetization.

The Head of Growth will own the entire customer journey, from first touch to activation and retention. While SEA is the company’s strongest acquisition channel today, the expectation is not optimization only but full ownership of growth strategy and execution.

This role requires a highly technical profile capable of working closely with engineers and designers to build, iterate, and ship growth experiments, including onboarding improvements and POCs. The company plans to eventually hire a GTM Engineer to work closely with this role. SEA execution is currently externalized.



In particular, their scope will be fivefold:

 1. Product Led Growth Strategy

 - Own the end to end PLG motion, from first touch to activation and retention

 - Partner closely with Product and Engineering to design and iterate on onboarding and activation flows

 - Contribute directly to defining US product market fit

 2. Acquisition and Performance Marketing

 - Own paid acquisition strategy, with SEA as a core growth lever

 - Scale spend confidently based on ROI and business impact

 - Launch and optimize retargeting strategies across channels

 - Work with external partners where execution is outsourced today

 3. Website and Onboarding Optimization

 - Improve landing pages, conversion paths, and activation funnels

 - Lead experimentation across website and onboarding experiences

 - Work hands on with designers and engineers to ship improvements quickly

 4. Experimentation and Analytics

 - Define growth KPIs and success metrics without overengineering analytics

 - Build a fast test and learn culture with clear ROI expectations

 - Evaluate and prioritize growth initiatives based on impact and effort

 5. Cross Functional Leadership

 - Build strong relationships with Product, Engineering, Revenue, SEO, Brand, and Content

 - Act as a growth leader who sets direction and executes alongside the team

 - Prepare the ground for future hires, including a GTM Engineer



Qualifications

The ideal candidate brings a strong blend of Product, SEA, and PLG experience. They are technical, deeply data driven, and highly interested in AI driven workflows, particularly in onboarding and activation.

This person has owned a product-led growth motion end to end, with significant experience in paid acquisition as a core lever. They come from consumer or prosumer SaaS companies with similar ACVs, such as Grammarly, Figma, or Notion, rather than Enterprise environments.

They are product centric, comfortable building or scoping POCs, and able to work hands on with engineers to fix, ship, or improve product experiences. They have been involved in building growth before true product market fit and have contributed directly to defining it.

The culture is fast moving and sometimes chaotic, with international profiles being a strong fit. Speaking Spanish is a strong plus but not a requirement.

Long tenure in previous roles is preferred, and the company is intentionally avoiding overly corporate profiles that look strong on paper but lack

source_jobs.title: Staff Engineer - Backend & Platform 🇦🇷
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE MOBILE-FIRST COMPANY

Most tools for small businesses weren’t built for real operators.
They were built for employees in offices, not people running a business from their phone.

We’re changing that.

We build mobile-first business software that feels like a consumer app, runs on AI, and spreads like a creator brand.

Our first product, Allo https://www.withallo.com/, gives you a second number on your phone, answers missed calls with AI, transcribes everything, and syncs it to your CRM.

Over 20,000 businesses use it every day.
Next up: expenses, invoicing, and more.

We’ve raised +15 million dolars from Base10, Lightspeed, EMBLEM, and 30+ top operators.
Our team is based in Paris, Buenos Aires, Miami.




MISSION

Drive the evolution of our backend technology, infrastructure, and AI capabilities to ensure high performance, scalability, and seamless integration for our platform.




WHAT WILL YOU DO

 - Work closely with our CTO and engineering team to design and evolve the core backend and platform architecture that powers all our applications.

 - Mentor and support other engineers.

 - Lead complex technical initiatives across backend systems, data infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and developer tooling.

 - Define and implement scalable foundations that allow the team to ship faster and operate reliably as we grow.
   
   


WHAT YOU’LL BE WORKING ON

 - Designing and evolving the backend architecture that powers our products and internal platform.

 - Building scalable and reliable services.

 - Improving infrastructure, observability, reliability, and deployment workflows across the engineering stack.

 - Working directly with cloud services (e.g., AWS, Supabase, Cloudflare).

 - Leading technical decisions and helping the team scale operationally.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR


BACKEND ENGINEERING

 - Strong expertise in backend development with languages like Kotlin, Java, Go, Python, or similar.

 - Proven experience building and operating scalable backend systems in production.

 - Deep understanding of distributed systems, reliability, and performance optimization.

 - Experience integrating AI models or AI-powered workflows into real product systems is a strong plus.




SYSTEMS ARCHITECTURE

 - Strong experience designing scalable architectures and making high-impact technical decisions.

 - Ability to design systems that remain reliable, observable, and maintainable as the company scales.




PLATFORM & INFRASTRUCTURE

 - Experience designing and improving developer platforms, CI/CD pipelines, or internal engineering tooling.

 - Strong understanding of cloud infrastructure and production environments.

 - Experience with monitoring and observability tools such as New Relic, Datadog or similar.




HOW YOU THINK

 - You care about why we build things, not just how.

 - You ask smart questions, challenge ideas when needed, and help shape what’s next.

 - You think in terms of user value and business impact.




HOW YOU WORK

 - You communicate clearly, give feedback with no ego, and help others grow.

 - You move fast, take ownership, and thrive in ambiguity.

 - You're comfortable working in English and in a small team with big goals.




WHAT MATTERS TO US

 - You’ve worked in product companies.

 - 7+ years of experience building and operating large-scale backend systems.

 - Experience owning or influencing architecture decisions across teams.

 - You’re proactive, autonomous, and comfortable operating in early-stage startup environments.

 - You can communicate in English, since that’s our official language. Most of the team also speaks Spanish and French.
   
   
   




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Competitive salary (in USD or local equivalent)

 - Equity package

 - 10-day team retreats abroad every quarter

 - Trips to our Hubs (Pairs/Miami/BA) for onboarding and more

 - Laptop and work setup of your choice

 - Coverage for private health insurance (for US or LATAM hires)

 - A tight, ambitious team buildin

source_jobs.title: Account Executive SMB
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE MOBILE-FIRST COMPANY

Most tools for small businesses weren’t built for real operators.
They were built for employees in offices, not people running a business from their phone.

We’re changing that.

We build mobile-first business software that feels like a consumer app, runs on AI, and spreads like a creator brand.

Our first product, Allo https://www.withallo.com/, gives you a second number on your phone, answers missed calls with AI, transcribes everything, and syncs it to your CRM.

Over 20,000 businesses use it every day.
Next up: expenses, invoicing, and more.

We’ve raised +15 million dolars from Base10, Lightspeed, EMBLEM, and 30+ top operators.
Our team is based in Paris, Buenos Aires, Miami.



Our flagship product, Allo, is the business phone for the AI era. It answers missed calls with AI, transcribes everything, and syncs it to CRMs, across mobile and desktop, without the hardware, or the legacy software nobody actually likes. We're an agile, AI-first team of 20, shipping new features every single month

Were an AI first team 20. We expanded to the US market, in November and customers are loving the product and we cannot handle the volume alone. We need someone in Miami to own our inbound pipeline and make sure every lead turns into a happy customer.

We've grown our new monthly revenue more than 5x in under a year. Thousands of businesses use Allo every day and we're still in the early innings of the US market. Backed by $15M from Base10, Lightspeed, and EMBLEM, with a team across Paris, Buenos Aires, and Miami, this is what a rocketship looks like before it breaks through.

The role

Over 1,000 people sign up for Allo every week. Most of them are small business owners looking for a better phone system. Some convert on their own. Many don't, not because the product isn't right for them, but because we simply do not have the capacity to reach everyone, thats why we are hiring for this role!

You'll call every new signup, understand what they need, walk them through Allo, and turn them into paying customers. You own the full cycle from first call to closed deal. No cold outreach, no chasing unqualified leads. Every person you talk to already raised their hand.

 - This is a highly transactional role with the average sales cycle 7 days

 - Target is 50+ new customers per month.

 - You report directly to the Head of Sales and work closely with the CEO.

 - You'll be one of the first two sales hires on the US team.

 - If you perform, the growth path is obvious: we're scaling this team and we promote from within.

What you'll own

 - You will own the entire trail to conversion process, from picking up the phone and calling a qualified lead to demoing them the ins and outs of how to use Allo to closing the deal

 - Keeping CRM records clean, notes clear, and follow-up sequences sharp

 - Supporting customers through onboarding when needed

 - Help contribute to the inbound sales playbook including scripting, sequence creation and more

Who You are

 - You're not afraid to call a plumber, a dentist, or a roofing contractor. Our customers are traditional business owners. They're busy, sometimes frustrated, and they don't want a pitch. They want someone who listens, understands their problem, and helps them fix it. You're that person.

 - You actually understand the product you sell. You're not reading a script. You can demo Allo, troubleshoot a setup question, and explain why it's better than what they have today. You're half salesperson, half support, and that's what makes you effective.

 - You turn frustration into trust. A lead signs up, gets confused, almost churns. You call them, you're warm, you're patient, you walk them through it. Twenty minutes later they're a paying customer who loves you. That's your superpower.

 - You can talk about anything. Sports, the weather, their business, their kids. You know how to build rapport with anyone in 30 seconds. You break the ice before you break into the pitch

source_jobs.title: Operating Partner, MobileFirst Ventures
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE MOBILE-FIRST COMPANY

Most tools for small businesses weren’t built for real operators.
They were built for employees in offices, not people running a business from their phone.

We’re changing that.

We build mobile-first business software that feels like a consumer app, runs on AI, and spreads like a creator brand.

Our first product, Allo https://www.withallo.com/, gives you a second number on your phone, answers missed calls with AI, transcribes everything, and syncs it to your CRM.

Over 20,000 businesses use it every day.
Next up: expenses, invoicing, and more.

We’ve raised +15 million dolars from Base10, Lightspeed, EMBLEM, and 30+ top operators.
Our team is based in Paris, Buenos Aires, Miami.



The role

The Operating Partner runs our acquired service businesses day-to-day. You own the P&L. You manage the frontline teams. You make the calls that determine whether these businesses grow or stagnate.

This is not a strategy role. Not M&A. Not advisory. You are the CEO of the businesses in our portfolio: accountable for revenue, margin, headcount, and customer experience from day one.

You report directly to Jeremy, our CEO, and work closely with the founding team on new acquisitions and integrations.



What you'll own

 - Full P&L ownership across our portfolio of acquired service businesses

 - Frontline team management: hiring, performance, culture, retention

 - Building the operational playbooks: scheduling, SLAs, pricing, unit economics

 - Driving EBITDA growth through cost discipline and service quality

 - Evaluating and integrating new acquisitions alongside the CEO

 - Deploying technology, including Allô, to make operations faster and leaner



Who you are

 - You've run something real. Not managed a team inside a big org. Not advised a portfolio company.

 - You've owned a P&L, made payroll, you know what it feels like when the business is your problem.

 - You can manage people who don't have laptops. Our businesses have technicians, cleaners, drivers, baristas. Leading them requires presence, clarity, and trust.

 - You have more to prove than to protect. You want ownership, not a title.

 - You make structure where there is none. That energizes you, it doesn't slow you down.

 - You use AI tools to work faster. If you're not already using Claude, Cursor, or equivalent tools daily, this probably isn't the right fit.

 - Spanish is a plus.



What's mandatory

 - You've owned a P&L: not managed it, owned it

 - You've led frontline or mixed-skill teams (not just knowledge workers)

 - You've operated inside a service business, rollup, or search fund portfolio company

 - You use AI tools in your daily work

 - Miami-based or willing to relocate. This role requires hybrid-physical presence.
   
   

What we offer

 - Equity package

 - EBITDA sharing tied directly to the performance of the businesses you run

 - Trips to our hubs (Miami / Paris / Buenos Aires)

 - Team retreats abroad every semester

 - A tight, ambitious team building something real, fast


HOW TO APPLY

Click the Apply button on this page to send your application.

No cover letter needed just tell us who you are and why this role fits you.

Not the perfect match, but want to join us? Send a spontaneous application to talent@themobilefirst.co jeremy@themobilefirst.co.

We welcome people from all backgrounds.

If you’re part of an underrepresented group in tech, we especially want to hear from you.

notes: Mobile-first business software company with a strong engineering focus
